title: 'abbiyr #0047
definition:
1) mighty, valiant
    1a) of men
    1b) of angels
    1c) of animals
    1d) (metaph)
        1d1) of enemies
        1d2) of princes
        1d3) of sacrificial objects
    1e) obstinate (fig.)
